title: Retryable batch SysOperation service (implements BatchRetryable / isRetryable)
instruction: In the sandbox model, implement a retryable batch job over ConDemoNoteHeader. Create: (1) a DataContract class DemoNoteReindexContract with a parm method BatchGroupId decorated [DataMemberAttribute]; (2) a SysOperation service class DemoNoteReindexService extending SysOperationServiceBase and implementing BatchRetryable, whose process(DemoNoteReindexContract _contract) method iterates ConDemoNoteHeader, and whose isRetryable() returns true so the batch framework retries transient failures; (3) a controller class DemoNoteReindexController extending SysOperationServiceController that constructs the service operation and defaults the execution mode to SysOperationExecutionMode::ScheduledBatch. Use get_knowledge(topic="async batch") to ground the BatchRetryable / SysOperation scheduled-batch pattern. All classes must build clean.
